exhibits.name: State Specific Addenda
exhibits.notes: Contains state-specific modifications to FDD and franchise agreements. Key overrides include dispute resolution, renewal provisions, and franchisee protections.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited by Ernst & Young. FY2024 statements with FY2023 comparatives (pages 95-109). FY2023 statements with FY2022 comparatives (pages 110-124). US GAAP basis. Unqualified opinion.

exhibits.name: List of Operational Franchisees
exhibits.notes: Names, addresses, telephone numbers of all US franchisees as of 12/31/2024. PII — not extracted.

exhibits.name: List of Discontinued Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 8 franchisees who ceased in year ending 12/31/2024. PII — not extracted. Confidentiality clauses noted.

exhibits.name: Area Development Agreement
exhibits.notes: Includes base agreement plus state-specific addenda for area development

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement — Retail Location
exhibits.notes: Primary franchise agreement for retail location franchisees. Includes Personal Guaranty and state-specific addenda.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement — Mobile Business
exhibits.notes: Primary franchise agreement for mobile franchisees. Includes Personal Guaranty and state-specific addenda.

exhibits.name: Standard Re-Franchise Addendum
exhibits.notes: Terms for re-franchising (renewal) of existing franchise

exhibits.name: Re-Franchise (Retirement) Addendum
exhibits.notes: Allows termination with 2 years notice after age 55

exhibits.name: Glass Repair Only Re-Franchise Addendum
exhibits.notes: For existing repair-only franchisees re-franchising

exhibits.name: Delay of Vehicle Leasing Requirement Addendum
exhibits.notes: Allows purchase/lease from third parties for up to 3 years at franchisor's sole discretion

exhibits.name: MSO Royalty Credit Program Addendum
exhibits.notes: Royalty credit for multi-store operators with 2+ retail locations

exhibits.name: 10-Year NAPA Co-Location Addendum
exhibits.notes: For NAPA Auto Care Center co-locations, 10-year term

exhibits.name: 5-Year NAPA Co-Location Addendum
exhibits.notes: For NAPA Auto Care Center co-locations, reduced 5-year term with reduced fees

exhibits.name: Additional Business Addendum
exhibits.notes: Allows affiliate to operate non-competing business at same facility

exhibits.name: Vehicle Lease Agreement
exhibits.notes: 60-month sublease from franchisor; mandatory for all vehicles. Critical subordination clause.

exhibits.name: Equipment Lease Agreement
exhibits.notes: Lease of windshield repair equipment from Novus 2 LLC

exhibits.name: TAG Network Participant Agreement
exhibits.notes: Claims management/referral service operated by Speedy Novus Glass affiliate

exhibits.name: Software Sublicense Agreement
exhibits.notes: POS and accounting software license

exhibits.name: Tables of Contents of Manuals
exhibits.notes: I-1 through I-5: Auto Glass Replacement (76pp), Workbook (75pp), Windshield Repair (150pp), Operations (249pp), Brand Standards (67pp)

exhibits.name: Franchisee Disclosure Questionnaire
exhibits.notes: Referenced in Item 22; location within exhibit section not precisely identified

exhibits.name: ProColor Amendment
exhibits.notes: Reduces term to 5 years and certain fees for ProColor co-location franchisees

exhibits.name: State Agency Exhibit and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: State regulatory contacts and registered agents

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates Page
exhibits.notes: Immediately follows exhibits

exhibits.name: Receipt
exhibits.notes: Detachable acknowledgement of receipt — last page
